title: Vignette
description: A single decision moment. See docs/04_Game_Design.md §'Shape of a Vignette'.

setting_beat.description: 1-3 sentences of present-tense narration placing the character in a specific moment. No generic flavor; every setting is specific (see docs/04 §'Shape of a Vignette').

ambient_audio.description: Optional ambient audio asset key in R2. Null if vignette has no audio layer.

ambient_art.description: Optional still image asset key in R2.

choices.description: 2-4 natural-language choices. No labels, no MBTI-coded options. Per docs/04 §'Shape of a Vignette'.

resolution_beats.description: Optional per-choice resolution narration keyed by choice id. 1-2 sentences. Never judgmental.
